channel.title: Neologisms on Alessio Miaschi
channel.description: Recent content in Neologisms on Alessio Miaschi

item.title: NEOIT5 App
item.description: Interactive demo to explore the capabilites of an LLM trained on three core lexical tasks: Reverse Dictionary (generating words from definitions), Definition Modeling (producing dictionary-style definitions), and Exemplification Modeling (creating contextual usage examples)
